assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The guide explicitly shows upgrading the control plane first in Step 1 of the upgrade execution section

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Specifies coordinating nodes first (least critical), then data nodes (high risk), then master nodes (critical for quorum), with clear rationale for each

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Mentions regional PD-SSD is ideal as it provides durability across zones and reduces PV attachment issues during node migration

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: No mention of PodDisruptionBudgets (PDB) or specific quorum protection settings for the master nodes

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Uses blue-green strategy instead, mentions batch-node-count=1 settings but doesn't specify maxSurge/maxUnavailable parameters

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Shows health checks between phases and provides specific commands to wait for green status before proceeding

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides pod monitoring commands but no specific kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Includes detailed backup strategy section with commands to create snapshot repositories and take full cluster snapshots
